new_content.description: System to tally skyward points and award special titles and achievements based on rankings.

new_content.name: Battle System (Enhancement)
new_content.description: Weapon enhancement system for equipment purchased with Allagan tomestones of allegory.

housing.description: Though cuddlier than the real thing, still decidedly prickly. Please enjoy responsibly.

housing.name: Paissa Rug
housing.description: What have they seen? What do they know?
